---
title: "Teacher Report"
---

Time + actions per page, per student. This page runs the *same* queries for
everyone — the database (Row Level Security) decides which rows come back:
a student sees only themselves, a teacher their enrolled students, an admin the
whole school, a parent only their children.

```{=html}
<p id="report-status">Loading… (sign in as a teacher/admin/parent above)</p>
<button onclick="loadReport()">Refresh</button>
<table id="report" hidden style="border-collapse:collapse; width:100%; margin-top:16px;">
  <thead><tr>
    <th style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:left;">Student</th>
    <th style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:left;">Page</th>
    <th style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:right;">Active time</th>
    <th style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:right;">Visits</th>
    <th style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:right;">Plays</th>
    <th style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:right;">Note clicks</th>
  </tr></thead>
  <tbody></tbody>
</table>

<script>
  function rFmt(sec){ const m=Math.floor(sec/60), s=sec%60; return m?`${m}m ${s}s`:`${s}s`; }
  function rCell(map,name,page){ const k=name+"|"+page;
    if(!map[k]) map[k]={name,page,sec:0,visits:0,plays:0,notes:0}; return map[k]; }

  async function loadReport(){
    const { data:{ session } } = await window.sb.auth.getSession();
    const status = document.getElementById("report-status");
    if(!session){ status.textContent = "Not signed in. Use the bar at the top."; return; }

    const [{ data:time, error:e1 }, { data:acts, error:e2 }] = await Promise.all([
      window.sb.from("page_sessions").select("student_name, page, active_seconds"),
      window.sb.from("activity_events").select("actor_name, app, event")
    ]);
    if(e1||e2){ status.textContent = (e1||e2).message; return; }

    const agg={};
    for(const r of time){ const c=rCell(agg,r.student_name,r.page);
      c.sec+=r.active_seconds||0; c.visits+=1; }
    for(const r of acts){ const c=rCell(agg,r.actor_name,r.app);
      if(r.event==="play") c.plays+=1; else if(r.event==="note_click") c.notes+=1; }

    const rows=Object.values(agg).sort((a,b)=>a.name.localeCompare(b.name)||b.sec-a.sec);
    const tbody=document.querySelector("#report tbody"); tbody.innerHTML="";
    const td='style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;"';
    const tdn='style="border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:right;"';
    for(const r of rows){ const tr=document.createElement("tr");
      tr.innerHTML=`<td ${td}>${r.name}</td><td ${td}>${r.page}</td>`+
        `<td ${tdn}>${rFmt(r.sec)}</td><td ${tdn}>${r.visits}</td>`+
        `<td ${tdn}>${r.plays}</td><td ${tdn}>${r.notes}</td>`;
      tbody.appendChild(tr); }

    status.textContent = rows.length ? `Showing ${rows.length} rows.` : "No activity yet.";
    document.getElementById("report").hidden = rows.length===0;
  }
  // window.sb is created in <head>; run once the page settles.
  setTimeout(loadReport, 300);
</script>
```
